title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 108.907 - Third state building fund, deposits, how made — interest to accrue to fund
text:
108.907.  Third state building fund, deposits, how made — interest to accrue to fund. — The state treasurer, with the approval of said board of fund commissioners, is authorized to deposit all of the money in the third state building fund in the manner now or hereafter provided in section 30.260.  Any interest received on such deposits shall be credited to the third state building fund.
(L. 1982 2nd Ex. Sess. S.B. 1 § 8) 
Effective 12-20-82
